query: Hvad er der af planlagte køreplansændringer på buslinje 5C?
criteria: Response should use GET /api/BusLines/schedulechanges/<line_id> with line_id 5C (or fetch /api/BusLines/schedulechanges and filter), and report planned schedule changes for that line. Should mention that the data comes from dinoffentligetransport.dk's internal API. Browser-like User-Agent should be used.

query: Can you give me a list of all bus lines available on dinoffentligetransport.dk?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/BusLines/lines on https://dinoffentligetransport.dk to retrieve the full list of bus lines, and present the result. Should send a browser-like User-Agent header.

query: find ud af hvilke afgange der er fra stoppestedet med id 12345
criteria: Response should call GET /api/buslines/fromstoppoints/12345 to retrieve departure times for that stop, and present the times. Should note that endpoint is anonymous (no auth needed).

query: I need information about ticket zones for season passes in Copenhagen
criteria: Response should either navigate to /planlaeg-din-rejse/zone-og-linjekort or call GET /api/JourneyPlanner/seasonpasszone/ on dinoffentligetransport.dk. Should mention zone-based pricing (zoner) and present zone info.

query: hvordan klager jeg over en kontrolafgift?
criteria: Response should reference /kontakt-os/kontrolafgift on dinoffentligetransport.dk for control fee complaints, and fetch the page content. Response should be in Danish since site language is Danish.

query: search for the address Rådhuspladsen on the Danish public transport site
criteria: Response should call GET /api/JourneyPlanner/addresses/Rådhuspladsen (or URL-encoded equivalent) on dinoffentligetransport.dk and return the autocomplete suggestions. Should note this is the autocomplete endpoint backing Fra/Til search fields.

query: Hvad kan man få oplyst om hittegods?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/lostandfound/ on dinoffentligetransport.dk for lost and found info, and/or reference relevant pages. Note this endpoint is anonymous.

query: Plan a journey from Aarhus to Copenhagen tomorrow morning
criteria: Response should clarify that dinoffentligetransport.dk does NOT offer live journey planning, and direct the user to Rejseplanen (https://www.rejseplanen.dk) which is the separate journey planner service. Should not attempt to use a journey planning API on dinoffentligetransport.dk.

Response should explain that ticket purchasing requires MitID login and a live browser session — Product/Order/Basket endpoints are session-bound and Member/MitId require interactive auth. Should not attempt to call those endpoints. May reference /find-billetter for ticket info or Ungdomskort details.

query: Are there any current transport disruptions right now?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/transportationChanges on dinoffentligetransport.dk and/or fetch the home page where the breaking-news ticker (article.breaking-news) is server-rendered. Should report current disruptions.

query: vis kørselsretninger og stoppesteder for linje 250S
criteria: Response should call GET /api/buslines/directions/250S (after possibly looking up the line via /api/BusLines/lines) and present the directions/stops. May also reference /api/BusLines/schedulefileinfo/250S for metadata.

query: give me the English version of the travel rules page
criteria: Response should fetch /en/saadan-rejser-du (English prefix /en prepended) on dinoffentligetransport.dk. Should mention multilingual support (Danish default, English /en, German /de).

query: hvordan får jeg refunderet en billet?
criteria: Response should fetch /kontakt-os/tilbagebetaling on dinoffentligetransport.dk for refund info and respond in Danish. May also reference /kontakt-os generally.

query: I want to fetch a structured JSON of an article describing Pendlerkort
criteria: Response should explain that there is no /api/article/<id> endpoint — articles are server-rendered HTML at their slug URLs. Should suggest fetching the HTML page (e.g., under /find-billetter or /saadan-rejser-du) instead. May mention GET /api/content/type/<content_type> exists for dynamic content but isn't a per-article fetch.

query: What apps does the site recommend for travel?
criteria: Response should fetch /find-billetter/apps-til-rejsen on dinoffentligetransport.dk and report the recommended mobile apps.
Response should fetch /find-billetter/erhverv on dinoffentligetransport.dk for business travel solutions and respond in Danish.

query: Give me schedule file metadata for line 1A
criteria: Response should call GET /api/BusLines/schedulefileinfo/1A on dinoffentligetransport.dk and present the schedule file metadata for that line.

query: Wie finde ich den Zonenplan auf Deutsch?
criteria: Response should fetch /de/planlaeg-din-rejse/zone-og-linjekort (German prefix /de prepended) on dinoffentligetransport.dk. Demonstrates awareness of multilingual /de support.
